name: loupe
description: A design-QA tool · deviations measured by code, not guessed. Phases 0–7 rebuild it on solid ground.

stages.title: The overhaul · stability first, the keystone proven, then the reskin
stages.note: Phases 0–7 · each ends at its sign-off

phases.name: Preflight & the PRD gate
phases.desc: Prove the ground is solid before touching anything.
items: The component-fetch tooling verified before any UI work exists.
A green baseline: type checks and the full test suite pass in a real terminal · never build on an unverified base.
The work branch created · main is never touched.
The repo's own guide rewritten to match today's reality (it described a retired version).
A PRD that settles the open questions.

phases.name: Critical bugs fixed
phases.desc: Every showstopper closed, each with its own regression test.
items: Broken OpenAI support, a Figma-login save that lost data, a dead upload mode, saved reports rendering empty, a migration that wiped settings · all fixed.
The security hole closed: web walkthroughs refuse private/internal addresses.
Spending-cap correctness: no code path around the monthly cap.
Every fix ships a test that would catch it coming back.

phases.name: The retired studio removed
phases.desc: Theme Factory comes out whole · after its one shared capability is saved.
items: FIRST: the shared Figma capability is preserved; THEN deletion begins.
Tiles, tabs, files, and its two heavy dependencies removed.
A sweep proves no trace remains; the app shrinks.

phases.name: The keystone: measured, repeatable comparison
phases.desc: The reason Loupe exists · deviations measured by code, not guessed by AI. Proven on a fixture suite before anything claims “reliable”.
items: The design is read as data (positions, sizes, styles) · never squinted at as a screenshot.
Both sides normalized onto one canvas so nothing is misaligned from the start.
Elements matched two independent ways; asserted only when both agree · a mismatch is never invented.
Every deviation MEASURED (expected 16px, found 22px · off by 6) and located exactly.
Hover/focus states, declared motion, and responsive reflow checked too.
A golden-fixture suite proves the bar · or the gap is honestly ledgered.
Same inputs → the byte-identical report, every single time.

phases.name: Projects become real containers
phases.desc: Ground every run in a project: sources, targets, defaults, and its whole history.
items: A Project holds the bound design source, live targets, and default settings.
Opening a project pre-fills a run; any past run re-runs in one click.
History is diffable run-to-run · did the issue count drop? · with one identity per issue.
One unified Results surface ends the old split-brain.

phases.name: The learning engine
phases.desc: Loupe gets more reliable per project · but ONLY from your explicit ✓ / ✕ / ◐ labels. Nothing learns on its own.
items: A per-project calibration store built only from your labels.
✕ marks suppress that exact issue recurring · fingerprinted, so it never hides different issues.
◐ marks teach “intended for this brand” as the expected baseline.
Confirmed-real findings graduate into the fixture suite (with your click).
Reliability trends computed and inspectable; every learned rule revertible.
The measurement stays repeatable: rules are a versioned input, and engine-off = clean baseline.

phases.name: The Weave reskin
phases.desc: Every screen rebuilt on the Weave design system · gated HARD on the design handoff bundle.
items: No bundle, no build: the gate halts rather than improvise a screen.
Every surface and state rebuilt from handed-off component code · never from a screenshot.
Three verifications per screen: your file-diff sign-off · Loupe dogfooding its OWN Phase-3 engine on each built screen · a fresh-eyes cleanroom review.
The learning surfaces and inline ✓/✕/◐ controls land here.
Tokens from the design system only · no raw colors, no default greys.

paste.when: YOU run this to produce the handoff bundle · the builder never reads this file

status.blocked_note: Blocked until you run the design prompt and hand its bundle over · then P6 starts.

phases.name: The long tail
phases.desc: The remaining smaller bugs and fold-ins; a full regression pass; backlog stays excluded.
items: Remaining P2/P3 bugs fixed or deferred with a written reason.
Dead settings purged; an error boundary; progress wiring.
A regression pass across every surface.
New features (the backlog) stay excluded · sequenced, not cut.

phases.name: Backlog features & the web version
phases.desc: Deliberately excluded from this overhaul; each has a home in a later track.
items: Eight backlog feature ideas (K1–K8) wait for after the overhaul ships.
A web/SaaS version is its own future track · the core is kept browser-safe for it.
